name: Inzile AB (publ)
summary: Inzile AB (publ), a tech company, develops, manufactures, and sells intelligent electric vehicles in Sweden. It also provides modern transport and service solutions for a sustainable community. The company's product portfolio is Pro4 Work and Pro4 Van. It serves transportation and logistics companies, private companies, local authorities, and administrations. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in V√É¬§stervik, Sweden.
